Variables.Name: Material
Variables.Description: The material that the sprite is rendered with.

Variables.Name: DistanceToOpacityCurve
Variables.Description: A curve that maps distance on the X axis to the sprite opacity on the Y axis.

Variables.Name: bSizeIsInScreenSpace
Variables.Description: Whether the size is defined in screen-space or world-space.

Variables.Name: BaseSizeX
Variables.Description: The base width of the sprite, multiplied with the DistanceToSizeCurve.

Variables.Name: BaseSizeY
Variables.Description: The base height of the sprite, multiplied with the DistanceToSizeCurve.

Variables.Name: DistanceToSizeCurve
Variables.Description: A curve that maps distance on the X axis to the sprite size on the Y axis.
